backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the full backend: user profiles, customer registration/login, service orders, admin QR settings, and payment confirmations, with role-based access control via included mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (splash screen, admin login, customer login, service catalog, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key details of each component and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vijay Online Centre React app, loading Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts and mounting the Vite/React entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing a state-machine screen router that navigates between splash, login, service form, order tracking, receipt, payment, and admin screens, wrapped in AuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that lists all service orders as expandable cards with status color badges, filter tabs, and Accept/Reject/Confirm Payment action buttons with real-time polling.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a secure admin login form with user ID and password fields, using the AuthContext's adminLogin function to authenticate and calling onSuccess or displaying an error accordingly.
frontend/src/components/AdminQRManagemen: Admin panel component for managing payment QR codes, supporting uploading a custom QR image, setting a default QR, and configuring an auto-amount via tabbed UI backed by React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Static contact page displaying the business helpline number with action buttons for WhatsApp chat, direct phone call, and Google Maps location.
frontend/src/components/CustomerLogin.ts: Customer authentication component supporting manual login, registration, and OTP-based login modes, using React Query mutations to call backend login/register APIs and storing the session via AuthContext.
frontend/src/components/Home.tsx: Home dashboard component showing a personalized welcome header, quick-access action buttons navigating to key tabs, and a highlights strip summarizing platform features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell component that renders a top bar with logo/logout, scrollable content area, and a bottom navigation bar with tabs that differ between admin and customer roles.
frontend/src/components/LoginSelection.t: Landing screen presenting two login options (Customer and Admin) with branded header, routing to the appropriate login flow via callback props.
frontend/src/components/MyOrders.tsx: Customer-facing orders list page that fetches and displays the current customer's service orders sorted by date, with status badges and navigation to order detail/receipt views.
frontend/src/components/OrderTracking.ts: Order tracking detail page showing a step-by-step progress indicator through four stages (Submitted → Payment → Processing → Completed) for a specific order, supporting both admin and customer views.
frontend/src/components/PaymentScreen.ts: Payment page that displays a UPI QR code (either a stored permanent QR image or a canvas-generated placeholder) along with order details to guide the customer through payment.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Printable receipt component that fetches a specific order and renders its details in a styled card with a print button, accessible by both customers and admins.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCatalog.t: Displays a searchable, categorized list of all available services, allowing users to select a service to proceed with an application.
frontend/src/components/ServiceForm.tsx: Renders a form for submitting a service order, handling user input, optional file upload with progress tracking, and order submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Shows an animated splash screen with the app logo, name, and Hindi welcome message for 2.5 seconds before calling an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/VijayAIChatbot.t: Implements a floating AI chatbot widget that responds to user messages using keyword-based responses, supporting both Hindi and English.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context managing both admin (hardcoded credentials) and customer sessions, persisted via localStorage.
frontend/src/data/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines keyword-to-response mappings for the chatbot covering topics like services, payments, tracking, and contact info, with a getBotResponse lookup function.
frontend/src/data/services.ts: Defines a `Service` interface and exports an array of 32 government/utility services (certificates, ID cards, pensions, etc.) with id, name, category, icon, and description fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, customer auth (register/login), order submission/retrieval/status updates, and admin QR settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a navy-blue and silver design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, utility component classes, and base body/font styles.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: `ExternalBlob` utility class that wraps binary data or a URL, supporting creation from bytes or URL, upload progress callbacks, and conversion to object URLs or raw bytes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palette (navy, silver, gold, oklch-based tokens), fonts (Poppins, Noto Sans Devanagari), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for 'Vijay Online Centre', documenting version, feature list, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for a digital services Android/web platform targeting India with admin/customer login, service catalog, payments, and AI chatbot.
